name: project-mail

metadata.name: project-mail
metadata.summary: A Python package for email notifications using a decorator

documentation:
# project-mail

A Python package to send email notifications using a decorator.

## Installation

Install the package from PyPI:

```bash
pip install project-mail

functions.name: project_mail.smail.smail
documentation:
Decorator to send an email after executing the wrapped function asynchronously.

Args:
    project (str): The name of the project.

functions.name: project_mail.smail.send_email_notification
documentation:
Sends an email notification.

Args:
    project (str): The name of the project.
